tools.title: Spoki
tools.description: Italy's first WhatsApp conversational marketing platform. Automates marketing, sales, and customer support on WhatsApp using AI. Integrates with 4,000+ apps including e-commerce, CRM, and marketing software. Features AI chatbots with ChatGPT integration, bulk messaging, automation, scheduling, and WhatsApp CRM.
tools.use_case: WhatsApp marketing and customer support automation
tools.notes: Meta Tech Partner. No subscription - pay per use. 30-day money-back guarantee. Supports 50+ countries.

contact.location: San Vito dei Normanni, Puglia, Italy
